description: Boost your employee engagement and streamline your onboarding process with our resourceful email template. Designed specifically for hiring managers and human resources personnel, it's an ideal tool to welcome new employees on their first day. This template provides a comprehensive guide to familiarise your new hires with their work tools, helping them to adapt quickly and efficiently. A well-structured onboarding experience can significantly contribute to job satisfaction and long-term employee retention. So, set your new recruits on the path to success from day one with our user-friendly and informative email template. It's more than just a welcome, it's the first step towards building a productive and engaged workforce.
short_description: Boost employee engagement with our onboarding email template, ideal for HR and hiring managers. Welcome new employees on their first day and familiarise them with work tools for quick, efficient adaptation. Contribute to job satisfaction and retention from day one. It's more than a welcome, it's a first step towards a productive workforce.

designer.description:
My name is Andrea Dall'Ara and I'm a freelancer digital graphic designer.
I'm focused on UI design for websites, emails and applications, logo and icon design and digital illustration.
